'''paguku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dybbuk|dybbuk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dybbuk|dybbuk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| paguku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pægikith|pægikith]] || [[word:pægikij|pægikij]] || [[word:pægikish|pægikish]] || [[word:pægiki|pægiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pagugukuth|pagugukuth]] || [[word:pagugukuj|pagugukuj]] || [[word:pagugukush|pagugukush]] || [[word:paguguku|paguguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pagukuth|pagukuth]] || [[word:pagukuj|pagukuj]] || [[word:pagukush|pagukush]] || [[word:paguku|paguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pagufkuth|pagufkuth]] || [[word:pagufkuj|pagufkuj]] || [[word:pagufkush|pagufkush]] || [[word:pagufkuf|pagufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pagukuthu|pagukuthu]] || [[word:pagukuju|pagukuju]] || [[word:pagukushu|pagukushu]] || [[word:pagukuku|pagukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pagukuth|pagukuth]] || [[word:pagukuj|pagukuj]] || [[word:pagukush|pagukush]] || [[word:paguku|paguku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pagukuthul|pagukuthul]] || [[word:pagukujul|pagukujul]] || [[word:pagukushul|pagukushul]] || [[word:pagukukul|pagukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pagukuthuthu|pagukuthuthu]] || [[word:pagukujuju|pagukujuju]] || [[word:pagukushushu|pagukushushu]] || [[word:pagukuku|pagukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pagukuthun|pagukuthun]] || [[word:pagukujun|pagukujun]] || [[word:pagukushun|pagukushun]] || [[word:pagukukun|pagukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pagukuthuoro|pagukuthuoro]] || [[word:pagukujuoro|pagukujuoro]] || [[word:pagukushuoro|pagukushuoro]] || [[word:pagukukuoro|pagukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
